member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Api.IntroDbSkipController
member.summary: API endpoints for IntroDB marker cache.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Api.IntroDbSkipController.GetMarker(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a cached marker for the specified item id.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Configuración del plugin para la sincronización de intros.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Inicializa una nueva instancia de la clase .

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IntroDbBaseUrl
member.summary: URL base de la API de IntroDB.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IntroDbApiKey
member.summary: Clave de API para IntroDB.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IntroHaterBaseUrl
member.summary: URL base de la API de IntroHater.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SyncIntervalHours
member.summary: Frecuencia de sincronización (en horas).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MinimumConfidence
member.summary: Confianza mínima aceptada de los marcadores.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OverwriteExistingMarkers
member.summary: Indica si se deben sobrescribir los marcadores locales existentes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SyncOnPlaybackStart
member.summary: Indica si se deben buscar marcadores al iniciar la reproducción.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.AndroidExoAutoSkipFallback
member.summary: Indica si se debe forzar el salto de intro en clientes Android/Exo.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.Enabled
member.summary: Indica si el plugin está habilitado.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Metadata.SegmentInfo
member.summary: Segment payload for intro/recap/outro.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Metadata.IntroDbSegmentsResponse
member.summary: IntroDB response for GET /segments.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Metadata.IntroHaterSegment
member.summary: Segment payload returned by IntroHater.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Metadata.CachedIntroMarker
member.summary: Cached marker entry mapped to a Jellyfin item.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.IntroDbSkip.Plugin
member.summary: Main plugin class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.summary: Gets strongly typed plugin configuration.

member.summary: Registers plugin services in Jellyfin DI.

member.summary: Backfills intro markers from the configured intro sources.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Synchronizes intro markers for a single episode.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Fetches and stores intro marker for one episode.

member.summary: Gets a cached marker for an episode or fetches it from IntroDB.

member.summary: HTTP client wrapper for IntroDB API.

member.summary: Fetches episode segments from IntroDB.

member.summary: Fetches episode segments from IntroHater.

member.summary: Media segment provider that resolves Intro segments from IntroDB using episode metadata.

member.summary: Persists synchronized intro markers in plugin data.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Upserts an intro marker for a media item.

member.summary: Gets a marker for an item id.

member.summary: Gets all cached markers.

member.summary: Removes a marker by item id.

member.summary: Fetches IntroDB markers on playback start events.
